Items.Title: 领导 AWS 云俱乐部 | Lead an AWS Cloud Club
Items.Description:
阿什温·莱亚尼

发布于 2 月 7 日

是时候了！ 学生们，你们一直在等待，我们很自豪地宣布 AWS Cloud Clubs，即 18 岁以上学生主导的用户组，将在全球 10 个地区开放。 申请成为您学校的 Cloud Club Captain，以建立社区、学习 AWS 技术并发展您的职业生涯。 在这里申请： s12d.com/students

您是： 📚 就读于学院或大学或自学 🦉年龄在 18-28 岁之间 🫶有兴趣为您当地的学生社区创造点对点学习体验 ✨对提高 AWS 技术技能感到好奇

如果是，请加入您附近的 AWS 云俱乐部。 我们正在寻找杰出的云俱乐部队长来领导澳大利亚、孟加拉国、法国、印度、爱尔兰、墨西哥、尼日利亚、巴基斯坦、英国和美国的这些俱乐部。

它对您和您的社区有什么好处？ 根据您的活动，赚取 AWS 积分、认证凭证、赠品、定制学习和网络体验等福利。 我们将与您合作，让您的俱乐部更棒！

准备好？ 放？ 去！ 请在s12d.com/students填写 AWS Cloud Club Captain 申请表。 此表格现已开放，将于 2 月 19 日关闭。 如果您所在的地区未包含在启动列表中，请填写 Cloud Clubs 兴趣列表以表达您有兴趣创建或加入未来的俱乐部。

资料来源： aws.amazon.com/developer/community/stud ...

将您的 Github 存储库提升到一个新的水平 🚀️：创建完美 Github 存储库的分步指南。

一旦暂停，ashwinraiyani 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，ashwinraiyani 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ashwinraiyani 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ashwinraiyani 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 ashwinraiyani 的方法：

降低 ashwinraiyani 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ashwinraiyani 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ashwin Raiyani

Posted on Feb 7

It’s time! Students, you’ve been waiting, and we are proud to announce that AWS Cloud Clubs, student-led user groups for ages 18+, are opening in 10 regions worldwide. Apply to become your school’s Cloud Club Captain to build community, learn AWS tech, & build your career. Apply here: s12d.com/students

🎉 AWS Cloud Clubs are launching now 🎉

Are you: 📚 Enrolled in a College or University or learning on your own 🦉Aged between 18–28 🫶Interested in creating peer-to-peer learning experiences for your local student community ✨Curious about skilling up in AWS technology

👀Looking to build your career and network

If so, please join an AWS Cloud Club near you. We are looking for stellar Cloud Club Captains to lead these clubs in Australia, Bangladesh, France, India, Ireland, Mexico, Nigeria, Pakistan, United Kingdom, and the United States.

What’s in it for you and your communities? Based on your activities, earn perks such as AWS credits, certification vouchers, swag, bespoke learning and networking experiences, and more. We will work with you to make your Club awesome!

Ready? Set? Go! Please fill in the AWS Cloud Club Captain Application Form at s12d.com/students. This form is opening now and will close on Feb 19th. If your region isn’t included in the launch list, please fill in the Cloud Clubs interest list to express your interest in founding or joining a future club.

source : aws.amazon.com/developer/community/stud…

Take Your Github Repository To The Next Level 🚀️: A step-by-step guide on creating the perfect Github repository.

Once suspended, ashwinraiyani will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ashwinraiyani will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ashwinraiyani will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ashwinraiyani is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag ashwinraiyani:

Make all posts by ashwinraiyani less visible

ashwinraiyani consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ashwinraiyani will restore default visibility to their posts.
Items.Author: ashwinraiyani
